yieldType: CPOOL staking rewards / protocol incentive yield
yieldFrequency: Clearpool staking rewards are calculated and distributed at the end of each two-week epoch; rewards can be claimed at any time.

_meta.notes: No fixed or officially verified current CPOOL staking APR was normalized. Clearpool docs state staking yield varies by total CPOOL staked, active Oracles, and Oracle voting power.
